channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: ‘F**k India, China’ and more: The many controversies of Balen Shah, Nepal’s likely PM
Iran war: Why are wealthy Indians moving their money to Singapore?
Two Sukhoi pilots killed in Assam crash. What do we know about them?
Did Iran use a painted helicopter decoy to mislead the IDF strike?
Karnataka wants to ban social media for under-16s. But is it feasible?
Who are the Kurds, who could lead the next phase of Iran war?
Nepal’s ballot revolt: Voters seek change after years of political musical chairs
item.description: The mood across the country is to reject traditional parties such as the Nepali Congress, CPN UML and CPN Maoist for failing to curb corruption and deliver jobs and good governance — giving the 'Gen Z'-backed Rashtriya Swatantra Party a fair chance

item.title: How China’s caution in the Iran conflict shows its military limits
item.description: The big question remains: Can an army with untested weapons, without generals and driven mainly by ideological instructions, win a war?

item.title: How Pakistan’s West Asia ‘balancing act’ turned into diplomatic clownery
item.description: Pakistan’s statements during the ongoing crisis in West Asia give the impression of a government that was somersaulting in its response to every new development, yet running like a headless chicken, completely directionless in its diplomatic consistency

item.title: Beyond the Lines | West Asian crisis: Why Iran may hold the strategic advantage
item.description: Iran had been preparing for this day for years and has been banking on a vast landscape of mountains and valleys — terrain that allows assets to be relocated, camouflaged and secured

item.title: Sinking of Iranian frigate off Sri Lankan waters an act of stunning recklessness by the Trump administration
item.description: The sinking of IRIS Dena in international waters is the first acknowledged instance of an American submarine sinking an enemy surface vessel since World War II, and the first torpedo-based sinking of any warship since the 1982 Falklands War

item.title: Nepal polls: Can Balen Shah vanquish the old guard?
item.description: Balen Shah, a rapper-turned-Kathmandu mayor, has become a symbol of disruption
